title: turbina abutiloides
intro: Turbina abutiloides, also known as Devil's Claw Vine or Climbing Devil's Claw, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and analgesic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in digestive issues and stress relief. The herbal preparations of Turbina abutiloides often include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
